question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/Downloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: downloadNextBatch()] Can an unprivileged external user inject a crafted stream file whose timestamp exceeds the configured endDate, causing downloaderProperties.setEnabled(false) to be called and permanently halting all transaction confirmation by the mirror node?
